title: Customer Journey Mapping Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Customer Journey Mapping skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_customer_persona.description: Defined customer persona including demographics, goals, and primary jobs-to-be-done

enumeration_all_known.description: Enumeration of all known customer touchpoints across channels (digital, physical, human-assisted)

existing_quantitative_data.description: Existing quantitative data on touchpoint performance (e.g., web analytics, call center volume, survey scores by interaction type)

qualitative_customer_feedback.description: Qualitative customer feedback such as support tickets, interview transcripts, or usability study findings

internal_process_documentation.description: Internal process documentation or service blueprints showing backstage operations that affect customer-facing touchpoints

competitor_experience_benchmarks.description: Competitor experience benchmarks or industry CX benchmark data
